column1: The country groups in this file have been implemented during the April 2026 WEO exercise and are used to calculate aggregates presented in the WEO Live database. The file also describes the countries in Group A+ and Group A, which are not used in the database but are relevant to the WEO/CSD submission process.

column3: Names and codes of all countries in the WEO Live database.
Names and codes of key country groups in the WEO Live database.
Country composition of key country groups in the WEO Live database; includes names and codes.
List of Group A+ and Group A countries. These groups are not included in the WEO Live database but are relevant to the WEO/CSD submission process.
Table of dummy variables for WEO country groups. Dummy variables use iData group codes.
Table of dummy variables for WEO country groups. Dummy variables use old EcOS group codes.
